title: feat: add Wan 2.7 Image models via DashScope
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Wan 2.7 enters the studio
gist.blurb: We've added Wan 2.7 Image and Wan 2.7 Image Pro to our lineup. Get ready for stunning 4K generations and models that actually think before they paint.
gist.summary: Added Wan 2.7 Image and Wan 2.7 Image Pro models via DashScope, bringing up to 4K resolution and thinking mode capabilities to the image generation API.
gist.impact: Users can now generate higher-resolution images with enhanced prompt adherence using the new wan-image and wan-image-pro models.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds Wan 2.7 image models (standard and pro with 'thinking mode' and 4K resolution). Visual symbols: A painter's studio, high-resolution canvases, a brain or 'thinking' motif. Characters: Polly the bee wearing a painter's beret, maybe the Monitor Robot holding a massive, highly detailed canvas.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a massive glowing high-resolution canvas. The chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a glowing brain symbol, representing 'thinking mode'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a massive glowing high-resolution canvas. The chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a glowing brain symbol, representing 'thinking mode'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background.
